sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74511" key="o)pisqofulaki/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀπισθο-φῠλᾰκία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n74511.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the command of the rear,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0032.tlg006.perseus-grc1:4:6:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.6.19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
